sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92167" key="r(a/ntisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥάν-τισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of a skin affection, <sense id="n92167.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">περὶ τὰς ὄψεις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:110:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
